# Baseline Studio

> Baseline is a web design studio that designs and builds fast, beautiful, conversion-focused websites for growing businesses. Strategy, design, and development under one roof. Remote-first, working with clients worldwide. Available in English and Spanish.

## About

Baseline turns quiet websites into a business's hardest-working salesperson. One team handles strategy, design, and development, so nothing gets lost in the handoff between agencies and freelancers. Projects are fixed-scope and fixed-price, typically launching in two to four weeks. Every build is custom (no templates), mobile-first, accessible, and engineered to load in under a second.

## Services

- **Website design & build**: Custom, conversion-focused websites built to load in under a second.
- **Redesigns & rescues**: A UX and conversion audit of your current site, then a rebuild with zero-downtime launch and SEO migration.
- **Brand & identity**: Logo and visual system, brand guidelines, and social/ad templates.
- **SEO & performance**: Technical SEO, Core Web Vitals tuning, on-page and local SEO, and analytics setup.
- **Landing pages**: Focused, A/B-ready pages engineered around a single measurable action.
- **Care & growth**: Optional monthly support for hosting, backups, edits, new pages, and reporting.

## Pricing

- **Launch**: A sharp, single-page site to get a new business online fast (launch in ~2 weeks).
- **Growth**: A full multi-page website (up to 8 pages) with an editable CMS, blog, SEO/analytics setup, and 30 days of post-launch support.
- **Scale**: Custom design systems, integrations, unlimited pages, and an ongoing dedicated team.

Every project is fixed-scope and fixed-price; the exact quote is tailored on a discovery call.

## Process

1. **Discover** — Define goals, customers, and competitors, and what success looks like.
2. **Design** — Review real, clickable designs and refine them together.
3. **Build** — Develop a fast, accessible site and load in your content, tested across devices.
4. **Launch** — Go live, train your team, then measure results and iterate.

- [Inicio (Español)](https://thebaselinestudio.com/es/): The full site in Spanish.
